children.text: describes all activities undertaken under this chapter, including a description of the process for the application for and approval of licenses under this chapter and recommendations for legislation that may further commercial launches and reentries; and
reviews the performance of the regulatory activities and the effectiveness of the Office of Commercial Space Transportation.
